vault.label: W1
vault.notes: Idle, non-trading. Receives 50% of every realized profitable exit.

trading_wallets.label: W9
trading_wallets.notes: Normal-scan trades capped at 0.15 SOL regardless of balance pct. freshSnipe:true enables Sniper Mode Priority — real-time pump.fun discovery, relaxed 0.45 gate + $10k liq in the first few minutes, up to 65% of balance (hard-capped at 0.6 SOL) once a token clears the 1-5min window and passes core safety checks.

trading_wallets.label: W8
trading_wallets.notes: Runs its OWN Sniper Mode Priority scan too now (independent of W9 — each wallet can catch a different fresh pump.fun launch in the same tick). If fresh-snipe finds nothing, falls back to mirroring W9's current position (the historically stronger performer: +6.26 SOL / 51% WR vs W8's own -9.65 SOL / 42% WR), then its own independent 0.70-gate scan as last resort. Fresh-snipe big-size window capped lower than W9 (0.3 SOL vs 0.6) to match W8's smaller allocation.
